title: Fermented Silky Flour Stir-fry
description: A decadent and indulgent low-carb Filipino dish featuring fermented flour mixed with a tantalizing blend of aromatic spices for a silky texture.
instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground pork or chicken and cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces as you stir-fry.
In a separate bowl, mix soy sauce, ginger paste, rice vinegar, and both kinds of seeds from tadka spices.
Pour the mixture over the cooked meat and stir well to coat evenly.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes until the flour absorbs and becomes creamy.
Garnish with fresh herbs or cilantro before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
